pageContext.name: Kodos
pageContext.description: The newest wave of The Simpsons ULTIMATES! is here to help you continue to build your own collection of Springfield's most interesting characters! Mr. Burns, Ralph Wiggum, Kang, and Kodos are made-to-order, highly articulated, deluxe 7 scale action figures featuring a variety of interchangeable parts and iconic accessories inspired by your favorite episodes of The Simpsons.  Kodos, the alien from Rigel VII, is definitely not here to eat you or the citizens of Springfield, but he would certainly like to cook for you. This 8 highly articulated ULTIMATES! figure of Kodos, as seen on The Simpsons, comes with interchangeable heads & tentacle tips and a variety of accessories, including a ray gun and How to Cook for Forty Humans cookbook. We may be unsure of his intentions, but what we can be sure of is that you need to get this made-to-order The Simpsons ULTIMATES! figure of Kodos before it returns to Rigel VII and the endless void of unordered collectibles regret!
